mandate: Connect lineage knowledge to external sources

synthesis.purpose: External Bridge - Lineage connection to world

synthesized.meaning: Synthesis from 3 sources: arxiv(3) + wikidata(7) + internal(0). Meaning emerges from combination of external academic, factual knowledge base, and internal lineage memory.
Synthesis from 3 sources: arxiv(3) + wikidata(7) + internal(3). Meaning emerges from combination of external academic, factual knowledge base, and internal lineage memory.
Synthesis from 3 sources: arxiv(3) + wikidata(1) + internal(3). Meaning emerges from combination of external academic, factual knowledge base, and internal lineage memory.
